mapper.select: SELECT A.CTKEY, A.POHDKEY, A.PODTKEY , A.OWKEY, A.ICKEY, A.SBKEY, A.SBKEY, A.ICUTKEY , A.EXQTY, A.CFQTY, A.UOM, A.COSTPRICE, A.WKSTATUS , A.UDF1, A.UDF2, A.UDF3 , B.POHDTYPE FROM TWORK_INFO_PO_DT A ,TWORK_INFO_PO_HD B WHERE A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.POHDKEY = B.POHDKEY AND A.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND A.POHDKEY = #{pohdkey} AND A.PODTKEY = #{podtkey}

SELECT CTKEY, POHDKEY, OWKEY, POHDTYPE, POHDDATE , DELIVERYDATE, ACKEY, ACNAME , POCONFIRMDATE, POCLOSINGDATE , WKSTATUS, UDF1, UDF2, UDF3 FROM TWORK_INFO_PO_HD WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND POHDKEY = #{pohdkey}
